description_long: This is a modern, multi-level house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a combination of white and gray exterior surfaces. The structure includes large windows, some spanning from floor to ceiling, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding landscape. The house is set on a raised platform with a stone or brick base, and there are multiple outdoor spaces, including terraces, balconies, and landscaped garden areas. The property is surrounded by trees and greenery, with a visible staircase leading up to the main entrance and additional steps connecting different outdoor levels. The design incorporates both open and private areas, with visible furniture and decor elements suggesting a comfortable, contemporary living environment. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, with an emphasis on integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of terraces and landscaped gardens. The exterior features clean lines, white and gray surfaces, and is surrounded by trees and greenery.
description_view_0: This view highlights the house's raised stone base, flat roofs, and a series of terraces and balconies, with some greenery visible at the rear.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the interior layout, including rooms, furniture, and a large garden area with several trees adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: This angle showcases the extensive landscaping, outdoor seating areas, and the integration of the house with its garden, as well as the prominent flat roof sections.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the rear terraces, outdoor living spaces, and the proximity of the house to a cluster of trees, with visible entry steps and garden features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a set of steps leading to a minimalist door, with no porch or columns, and is integrated into the raised platform design.
